scam_patterns.example: Congratulations! You won Rs.500,000 from SLT Mobitel! Click here to claim: bit.ly/xyz
scam_patterns.explanation: SLT never sends prize notifications via SMS with links. All official promotions are announced on slt.lk

scam_patterns.example: SLT Alert: Your account will be suspended. Update details now: bit.ly/slt-update
scam_patterns.explanation: SLT will never ask you to click shortened links. Official SLT links always use slt.lk or myslt.slt.lk domains

indicators: Asks to transfer money to personal account
scam_patterns.example: Your SLT bill is overdue. To avoid disconnection, transfer Rs.5000 to account 00123456 immediately
scam_patterns.explanation: SLT only accepts payments through official channels: myslt.slt.lk, SLT offices, banks, or authorized agents

indicators: Too good to be true salary
scam_patterns.example: SLT Mobitel is hiring! Work from home, earn Rs.50,000/month. WhatsApp 07XXXXXXXX for details
scam_patterns.explanation: SLT recruitment is only through careers.slt.lk. They never recruit via SMS or WhatsApp

indicators: Caller pretends to be SLT staff
scam_patterns.example: We are upgrading your SIM to 5G for free. Please share the OTP you received to complete upgrade
scam_patterns.explanation: NEVER share OTP with anyone. SLT staff will never ask for your OTP. SIM upgrades require visiting an SLT office with NIC

scam_patterns.example: SLT Special: Get 50GB FREE data! Reply YES to activate. Limited time offer!
scam_patterns.explanation: Official SLT promotions come from recognized short codes. Check myslt.slt.lk for genuine offers

scam_check_rules: Check if sender is from known SLT short codes
Look for shortened URLs (bit.ly, tinyurl, etc.)
Check for urgency language (immediately, now, last chance)
Look for requests for personal info (NIC, bank, OTP)
Verify offers on official SLT website
Check for grammar and spelling errors
